name: SemgrepSecurityScan
description: Comprehensive security scanning with Semgrep including SAST, SCA, and License compliance with configurable ticket creation and auto-fix PR capabilities
helpMarkDown:
**Visual configurator (dropdowns, YAML export):** open **Project → Semgrep → Scan Configuration** in the left sidebar.

**Before setup:** create Library variable group **Semgrep** with secrets **semgrep_token** and **adoPat**.

[Marketplace documentation](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=YashMishrar00thunter.semgrep-security-scan)
author: Yash Mishra

inputs.name: deploymentId
inputs.label: Deployment ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your Semgrep Cloud deployment ID. Find it in Semgrep AppSec Platform → Settings → General.

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose between PR Scan (differential) or Full Scan

inputs.name: baselineRef
inputs.label: Baseline Reference
inputs.helpMarkDown: Git reference to use as baseline for PR scans (default: origin/master)

inputs.name: semgrepAppToken
inputs.label: Semgrep App Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Store in Library group **Semgrep** as secret **semgrep_token**. In YAML: `semgrepAppToken: '$(semgrep_token)'`.

inputs.name: adoPat
inputs.label: Azure DevOps PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Store in Library group **Semgrep** as secret **adoPat**. In YAML: `adoPat: '$(adoPat)'`.

inputs.name: adoOrganization
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps organization (e.g. soshield-inc). Required for ticket routing.

inputs.name: adoProject
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps project (e.g. Engineering). Required for ticket routing.

inputs.name: logLevel
inputs.label: Log Level
inputs.helpMarkDown: Logging level for the extension

inputs.name: enableTicketCreation
inputs.label: Enable Ticket Creation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable creation of Azure DevOps work items for findings

inputs.name: ticketTypes
inputs.label: Ticket Types
inputs.helpMarkDown: Which finding types should create work items. For multi-select dropdowns use **Project → Semgrep → Scan Configuration**.

inputs.name: sastSeverities
inputs.label: SAST Severities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Severity filter for SAST tickets. Visual multi-select: **Project → Semgrep → Scan Configuration**.

inputs.name: sastConfidences
inputs.label: SAST Confidences
inputs.helpMarkDown: Confidence filter for SAST tickets.

inputs.name: scaSeverities
inputs.label: SCA Severities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Severity filter for SCA tickets.

inputs.name: scaReachabilities
inputs.label: SCA Reachabilities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Reachability filter for SCA tickets.

inputs.name: useDefaultLicenseWhitelist
inputs.label: Use Default License Whitelist
inputs.helpMarkDown: Use the default approved licenses list

inputs.name: licenseWhitelistOverride
inputs.label: Additional/Override Licenses
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional licenses to add to whitelist (comma or newline separated). If 'Use Default License Whitelist' is false, this becomes the complete whitelist.

inputs.name: generateSummary
inputs.label: Generate Summary Report
inputs.helpMarkDown: Generate detailed summary report with vulnerability information

inputs.name: summaryDisplayMode
inputs.label: Summary Display Mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to display the summary report

inputs.name: createFixPR
inputs.label: Create Fix PR
inputs.helpMarkDown: Create pull requests with auto-fixes for findings

inputs.name: fixPRBranchPrefix
inputs.label: Fix PR Branch Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix for branches created for fix PRs

inputs.name: groupFixPRsByType
inputs.label: Group Fix PRs by Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Group multiple fixes into one PR per rule type (SAST, SCA, etc.)

inputs.name: useAdoIterationApi
inputs.label: Fetch Current Sprint from Azure DevOps API
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, fetches the current sprint iteration path from Azure DevOps team settings (recommended). Falls back to Default Iteration Path if the API call fails.

inputs.name: adoTeam
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Team
inputs.helpMarkDown: Team used for sprint/iteration lookup (e.g. Engineering). Auto-detected from project teams if empty.

inputs.name: defaultIterationPath
inputs.label: Default Iteration Path (Sprint Fallback)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fallback iteration path when ADO API lookup fails. Use format Engineering\Iteration\Sprint 1 (no leading backslash). Copy from Project Settings → Teams → Iterations.

inputs.name: defaultAreaPath
inputs.label: Default Area Path (Team Fallback)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fallback area path for work items. Example: `Engineering\InfoSec`.
